subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass inquires about the encounter with the demons.
source_quote: inquires about the encounter with the demons

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses the deal.
source_quote: Felkur questions what will happen if he refuses

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur engages in a complex negotiation to secure favorable terms for the contract.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal, impressing Maram il Vass with his knowledge of binding law

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognizes the Chasma Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage.
source_quote: Daein recognizes the Chasma Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: Daein prepares an attack and shouts for the drow prisoner

subject: The Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'
source_quote: The remaining Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'

subject: The Chasma Demon
fact: The Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'
source_quote: The other Chasma Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'

subject: The party
fact: The party fabricated the origin of the armor sets, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party fabricated their origin, claiming they came from bandit camps and a raided castle, to increase their perceived value to Maram il Vass

subject: The Hags
fact: The hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners after the party's escape, muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help.
source_quote: muttering about the difficulty of finding good hired help
